description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On April 18, 2026 (Reiwa 8), I attended the entrance ceremony for Wasegaku Yumeiiku High School's 2026 academic year.

Wasegaku Yumeiiku High School is a place where students can gain diverse experiences and learning together with the people of the Higashi-Agano district. I sincerely hope that at this school, which walks alongside the community and continues to grow, all students will discover their "future dreams" and grow toward achieving them, spreading their wings wide. Congratulations on your entrance.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13468.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Attendance at Wasegaku Yumeiiku High School entrance ceremony
